# Xcellent1 Lawn Care

> Professional, licensed & insured lawn care for the River Parishes of Louisiana — mowing, edging, trimming, landscaping, bush hogging and yard maintenance. Free quotes. Call (504) 875-8079.

Xcellent1 Lawn Care is a local, owner-operated lawn and landscaping service based in LaPlace, Louisiana, serving the River Parishes (St. John the Baptist and St. Charles Parish) and surrounding communities. Residential and commercial. Service Monday–Saturday.

- Phone: (504) 875-8079 (+1-504-875-8079)
- Email: info@xcellent1lawn.com
- Website: https://xcellent1lawncare.com
- Service area: LaPlace, Reserve, Garyville, Gramercy, Lutcher, Norco, Destrehan, Luling, St. Rose, Edgard, Vacherie, Killona, Donaldsonville, Gonzales, Houma, LA

## Services
- Lawn mowing, edging & trimming (residential & commercial)
- Landscaping & yard maintenance
- Bush hogging / overgrown lot clearing
- Sod installation, weed control, fertilizing
- AI Lawn Care Assistant — diagnose lawn problems, plan landscaping, get maintenance schedules

## Key pages
- [Home](https://xcellent1lawncare.com/home.html): services, service area, free quote request

- [Blog](https://xcellent1lawncare.com/blog.html): Louisiana lawn care guides
